'''Kinfarg''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Gamorrean/Legends|Gamorrean]] who was possibly the alpha-male of the [[Klagg tribe|Klagg clan]]. He was captured by the [[Eye of Palpatine]] where he and many warriors of his clan were indoctrinated by [[The Will]].

{{Char-stub}}

==Appearances==
*[[Children of the Jedi (novel)|''Children of the Jedi'']] {{1st}}
*[[Children of the Jedi (abridged audiobook)|''Children of the Jedi'' abridged audiobook]]
